description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the .public/ directory using a key of ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs only on the main branch, with a before_script of "apt-get update && apt-get -y install cmake lcov", then runs the script commands in order: "cmake -DWITH_COVERAGE=on .", "make", "./pre-commit-tests", "lcov --directory . --capture --output-file coverage.info", "lcov --remove coverage.info \"/usr/*\" \"${PWD}/run/*\" \"${PWD}/test/*\" \"${PWD}/src/csiphash.c\" \"${PWD}/src/lily_alloc.c\" \"${PWD}/src/lily_pkg_core.c\" --output-file coverage.info", "genhtml -o .public coverage.info", "lcov --list coverage.info". In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the main branch, executes "mv .public public", and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact. No specific Docker image or services are defined.
